name: agent-commerce-payments
description: MEOK AI Labs — Agent-to-agent commerce, invoicing, payments, and escrow.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create a detailed invoice with line items, tax calculation, fees, and payment terms.

tools.name: process_payment
tools.description: Process payment for an invoice with fraud checks, fee calculation, and settlement.

tools.name: escrow_funds
tools.description: Place funds in escrow between two agents with conditions and expiry.

tools.name: release_escrow
tools.description: Release escrowed funds to the designated agent after condition verification.

tools.name: payment_history
tools.description: Get payment history for an agent with filtering, totals, and transaction summary.
